phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Figueres connection platform is
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿en qué andén sale el tren a Figueres?
phrases.pronunciation: dees-KOOL-peh, en keh ahn-DEHN SAH-leh el tren ah fee-GEH-res?

likely_response.local: Andén 3, al final del pasillo central.
likely_response.pronunciation: ahn-DÉN AHL fee-NAHL DEHL pah-SEEL-loh thehnt-RAHL
likely_response.translation_en: Main hall, check the information screens.

responses.english: Main hall, check the information screens.
responses.phonetic: ahn-DÉN AHL fee-NAHL DEHL pah-SEEL-loh thehnt-RAHL
responses.french: Andén 3, al final del pasillo central.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the AVE platform is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está el andén del AVE?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh es-TAH el an-DEHN del AH-veh?

likely_response.local: Andén 3, al fondo a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: ahn-DÉN AHL FOHN-doh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: Central platforms, follow the green signs.

responses.english: Central platforms, follow the green signs.
responses.phonetic: ahn-DÉN AHL FOHN-doh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: Andén 3, al fondo a la derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the luggage lockers are
phrases.pronunciation: dees-KOOL-peh, DOHN-deh PWEH-doh en-kon-TRAHR lahs kohn-SEE-nyahs

likely_response.local: Planta baja, junto a la salida norte.
likely_response.pronunciation: PLAHN-tah BAH-hah HOON-toh AH LAH sah-LEE-dah NOHR-teh
likely_response.translation_en: Ground floor, next to the north exit.

responses.english: Ground floor, next to the north exit.
responses.phonetic: PLAHN-tah BAH-hah HOON-toh AH LAH sah-LEE-dah NOHR-teh
responses.french: Planta baja, junto a la salida norte.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy tickets to Barcelona
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde compro billetes para Barcelona?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DOHN-deh KOHM-pro bee-YEH-tes pah-rah bar-seh-LOH-nah?

likely_response.local: En ventanilla 3 o máquinas junto al andén
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN behn-tah-NEEL-lah OH MÁK-ee-nahs HOON-toh AHL ahn-DÉN
likely_response.translation_en: At the main ticket office or automatic machines.

responses.english: At the main ticket office or automatic machines.
responses.phonetic: EHN behn-tah-NEEL-lah OH MÁK-ee-nahs HOON-toh AHL ahn-DÉN
responses.french: En ventanilla 3 o máquinas junto al andén
